row_fields.transform: raw / 100, currency formatting, read from first-cell tooltip
countRecords / countClients, rounded to 2 decimals; raw countVisits does not match period slices
row_fields.evidence: row equality verified on day and month slices

notes: Fresh report page load did not issue a browser-side /api/mobile/owner/efficiency request; the correspondence is proven by value-level verification between server-rendered UI and API payload.

UI total unique patients cannot be obtained by summing row-level countClients from mobile/owner/efficiency; it must be computed as a distinct patient set, independently reproducible from mobile/schedule for the report doctor set.
Row-level verification compares rendered UI values to parsed API values after unit normalization.
Unique-patient totals are cross-checked via mobile/schedule because mobile/owner/efficiency only exposes per-doctor countClients.
